message:
Running command: 
# 5h13m / ~85m elapsed. CPU slightly lower (369%) - normal variation.
# Large-scale DRT computing steadily.
# Big 6-hour sleep
sleep 21600
echo "=== 6h WAKEUP $(date) ==="
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log 2>/dev/null
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"
tail -80 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","RSS:"$6/1024"MB","TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD EXITED"
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" || echo "Not done"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15
